pfExemptionReason: Our company is legally exempt from the Employees' Provident Funds (EPF) Act because our total headcount was less than the statutory requirement of 20 or more employees during this tenure.
form16ExemptionReason: The employee's annual income was well below the taxable threshold during this tenure. Since no TDS was required or deducted, generating a Form 16 is not legally applicable.
